item.title: Issue #2482 created
item.description:
Add a fallback function to the `bin:decode-string` function

Discussion in #2467 suggests that there are circumstances where you'd need to do a binary load and then decode the string with fallback.

If we think this is worth doing, do we just add it to the argument list, or do we break down and switch to bin:decode-string($value,$options)?
